title: Urbano Santos Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Urbano Santos with a Z-Score of +3.71. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Urbano Santos are extremely hot, with a heat index exacerbated by 70% humidity.
The heat wave has resulted in a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 12.0 GG, while the Heating Degree Day (HDD) value remains at 0.0 GG.
Wind speeds of 5.8 km/h are doing little to alleviate the heat, making outdoor activities highly uncomfortable.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately to ensure public safety.
